S.FORM: Emmanuel Macron ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 12, Jos√© M√°rio Vaz, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1977) mrhuw France ta' misuw hya' ga Emmanuel Macron, aring ryax tay 14 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2017 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: emmanuel ma ¶~ ®ron rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj **, *os~…ē* m*rio *az, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw *ran ¶~ ®e ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a emmanuel ma ¶~ ®ron, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
